case_title: LVOVICH, VOLCHEQURSKY & SZUESKO, P.C. VS. ANGUS M CAMERON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2014 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY KENDAL C. FLETCHER--EMPLOYEE/ASSOCIATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CAMERON, ANGUS M
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVOVICH, VOLCHEQURSKY & SZUESKO, P.C.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LVOVICH, VOLCHEQURSKY & SZUESKO, P.C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMERON, ANGUS M $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,095.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LVOVICH, VOLCHEQURSKY & SZUESKO, P.C. AS TO DEFENDANT CAMERON, ANGUS M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $45.00 SERVED AUG-21-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CAMERON, ANGUS M
